title: Amtech I9200 9 Piece Offset Tamper Proof Torx bit Set
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: VERSATILE: This 9 piece offset tamper proof Torx bit set has straight and 90° angle drives and comes in a handy plastic bit holder with belt clip
SIZES: T10, T15, T20, T25, T27, T30 and T40
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 9Pc Offset Tamperproof Torx Bit Set See more
